summary: Razorpay Admin Subscription APIs Testing Complete - All tests passed. Backend: 20/20 pytest tests. Frontend API: 19/19 Playwright tests. All required features verified: search by name/email/phone/order_id, filter by status, stats with failed_orders count, orders include user_current_plan and user_subscription_expiry, payment history with status_message, sync-pending endpoint.

issues: No data-testid attributes on UI elements - recommend adding for easier automated testing

action_items: Admin credentials (admin@paras.com / 123456) show 'Wrong PIN' error - unable to test Admin UI page directly. Consider updating admin PIN or documenting correct credentials.
Add data-testid attributes to AdminRazorpaySubscriptions.js for better testability
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - tests use existing Razorpay orders in database
context_for_next_testing_agent:
Razorpay Admin Subscription APIs Testing Complete - Iteration 104:

## Backend API Tests (20 passed):
- GET /api/admin/razorpay-subscriptions - Returns all orders with stats
- Stats include: total_orders, paid_orders, pending_orders, failed_orders, total_revenue
- Orders include: user_current_plan, user_subscription_expiry, failure_reason, error_code
- Search by name/email/phone/order_id all working
- Filter by status (paid/created/failed/cancelled/error) working
- Combined search + filter working
- GET /api/razorpay/payment-history/{user_id}?include_all=true returns status_message and status_color
- POST /api/admin/razorpay/sync-pending syncs pending payments from Razorpay API
- GET /api/razorpay/config returns gateway configuration
- POST /api/razorpay/update-order-status validates inputs correctly

## Frontend API Tests (19 passed):
- All backend API integrations tested via Playwright request API
- Verified response structures and field presence
- Verified search, filter, and sync functionality

## Known Issues:
- Admin credentials (admin@paras.com / 123456) rejected with 'Wrong PIN' error
- Could not test Admin Panel UI at /admin/razorpay-subscriptions directly
- AdminRazorpaySubscriptions.js lacks data-testid attributes

## Test Files:
- Backend: /app/backend/tests/test_razorpay_admin.py (20 tests)
- Frontend: /app/tests/e2e/razorpay-admin-api.spec.ts (19 tests)
